text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day after a bout of heavy rain, I<n>go to check in
about the status of the<n>track with a staff member
I'm<n>acquainted with, when...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Might we have a<n>moment of your
time?

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yes, of course. We were just<n>finishing up our
conversation. I'll be<n>off, then!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wait! We're actually hoping to speakwith you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You're in charge of taking care of the<n>training
track, yes? Would it be all<n>right if we asked you a
few<n>questions?

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
Sure. I'm guessing yesterday's rain<n>has you two
worried, huh?

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
It really poured out here, didn't it? But<n>you don't
have to worry. It's totally<n>fine to use it today!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I can see that, but that's why it's so<n>terribly
strange!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: You see, yesterday...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't appear like the rain will<n>stop. I wonder if
it'll be dry enough to<n>train on by tomorrow
morning.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
We'll just have to come check! At<n>the very least,
we'll be able to do<n>stretches!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We didn't have our hopes up, so we<n>were
surprised how pristine and dry<n>the track was! It
was like<n>yesterday's rain never even<n>happened!

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Well, it wasn't all dry this<n>morning, but I
finished up the job with<n>some elbow grease.
Gotta keep the<n>track ready for everyone, right?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you mean you dried it off<n>manually?! But
when?! It was already<n>completely dry early this
morning.

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
Well, there's diligent athletes like you<n>who come
out at the crack of dawn to<n>practice. You motivate
me to work<n>just as hard.

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
That's why I always make sure to<n>wrap up my
morning routine before<n>the grounds open for the
day.
choice_data_list: You sure have your work cut out for you!

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
Haha. I won't argue with that. But<n>it's all of you
who make my job<n>worth doing.

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
Running in the competition of your<n>dreams against
your rivals...

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
If waking up a little earlier than normal<n>means I
can help you all achieve your<n>goals, then I'm more
than happy to<n>do so.
choice_data_list: I understand that feeling very well.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Um! Do you mind if I ask one more<n>question?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
What made you decide to work at<n>Tracen
Academy instead of the<n>racecourses that hold
those<n>competitions we all dream of?

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text: Well, that's because...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, Trainer! Because<n>of you, I
was finally able to realize my<n>dream!

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
Seeing that racer crying in joy at her<n>moment of
triumph moved me. It<n>made me wonder just how
hard she<n>had to work to reach her goal.

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
The more I thought of it, the more<n>restless I
became. I wanted to do all I<n>could to help racers
fulfill their<n>dreams, so I came here to Tracen!
choice_data_list: So that's what brought you here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After seeing the staff member off, I<n>come back to
find the two students<n>with serious looks on their
faces.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I never considered how hard the staff<n>worked to
support us.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I really feel I mustn't take their<n>efforts for granted,
especially after<n>that conversation.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
If only we could do something to<n>show them our
appreciation...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And it's not just the maintenance<n>staff we have
to thank either, is it?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Right. There are also the cooks in the<n>cafeteria
who make us such delicious<n>meals every day.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And also the custodians who keep<n>the academy
nice and clean.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
What if we did something for<n>everyone to show
them our thanks?
choice_data_list: I'm sure they'd all be delighted.
I'm sure they'd all be delighted.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to start thinking of<n>something right
away!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've realized the extent to<n>which
everyone supports us, I want<n>to make sure I
express my gratitude<n>to all of them!
